summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PlacementPrep platform. All major features working correctly: Theme switching (dark/light with proper background changes), Aptitude module (10 questions practice, 20 questions test), Reasoning module (10 questions practice, 20 questions test), Authentication (login/signup/token validation), Password reset flow, Interview module. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in interview start endpoint.

minor.issue: Fixed - was returning MongoDB ObjectId causing serialization error

issues: UI text shows '8 questions' for Practice and '15 questions' for Test, but API actually returns 10 and 20 questions respectively. Minor text inconsistency.

action_items: Minor: Update ReasoningModule.js mode selection text to show '10 questions' for Practice and '20 questions' for Test to match actual API behavior
critical_code_review_comments: Password reset uses in-memory storage (reset_tokens dict) - will be lost on server restart. Consider using database or Redis for production.
Password reset email is MOCKED - only logs token to console, no actual email sent.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed interview start endpoint to use .copy() before MongoDB insert to avoid ObjectId serialization
seed_data_creation: Test user already exists in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Theme switching verified with actual background color changes (dark: rgb(2,8,23), light: rgb(255,255,255)). Aptitude and Reasoning modules correctly load 10 questions for Practice mode and 20 for Test mode. Interview module working after ObjectId fix. Password reset flow works but email is MOCKED (logs to console only).

theme_switching.details: Dark mode background: rgb(2, 8, 23), Light mode background: rgb(255, 255, 255). Toggle works correctly on Dashboard.

aptitude_module.practice_mode: PASS - 10 questions load correctly for quantitative, logical, verbal categories

reasoning_module.practice_mode: PASS - 10 questions load correctly for pattern, analytical, visual categories

password_reset.forgot_password: PASS - endpoint works, returns success message
password_reset.note: MOCKED - No actual email sent, token logged to console

mocked_apis.password_reset_email: MOCKED - Token logged to console, no SMTP configured
mocked_apis.interview_ai_responses: Local heuristic logic, no external AI API
